place: Bophut, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: Hillside Treetop & Ocean-View Pool Villa, Bophut, Koh Samui
note: Fully staffed · chef on request · + tax & service
blurb: A 630 m² hillside villa in a managed beachfront residence estate at Bophut, waking to ocean and treetop views from an elevated setting. Just a six-minute drive to Fisherman’s Village and a three-minute walk to Bophut Beach, with an open-plan living room whose full-height doors frame a 12-metre infinity pool. Fully staffed, with an optional private chef.
detail:
Wake to ocean and treetop views from this 630 m² hillside villa, set on an elevated plot within a managed beachfront residence estate at Bophut. The property is just a six-minute drive to Fisherman’s Village and a three-minute walk to Bophut Beach; highlights include an open-plan living room with full-height doors that frame a view of the 12-metre infinity pool and the beach beyond.

Facilities are made for a life of leisure, set across three storeys in a pavilion-style layout. The villa features an outdoor dining area as well as an air-conditioned indoor dining room with a well-equipped kitchen, while water hyacinths and other verdant touches complete the restful tableau.

Two double guest rooms sit on the pool level and open onto the pool deck and a sea view, while a twin bedroom on the ground floor has sliding doors into a secret garden and atrium. Each bedroom has its own en-suite with a rain shower, safe and TV; on the top level the largest bedroom adds its own balcony and a sunken bathtub with a sea view. The 12-metre pool has a shallow end for children. Fully staffed with an optional private chef, and kayaks, yoga mats and a BBQ grill available on request. The shoreline in front of the estate is rocky; a short 200-metre stroll along the coast brings you to a swimmable stretch of beach.

features.l: 12 m infinity pool · kids’ shallow end
Kayaks · yoga mats · BBQ on request
130 m to beach · 6 min to Fisherman’s Village
